examples: A written IQ test is merely a guideline.
The figures are a useful guideline when buying a house.
Height-weight tables give an approximate guideline as to whether one is simply overweight or has passed into the obese stage.
PCTs need to consider the detail of the full guideline, take stock, and review their services.
Others use Guideline Daily Amounts - or GDAs - which give the percentage of recommended intake.
